examine_text:
Nina
My dear daughter
It appears the king's men
had finally caught up with me
Please do not worry I will be fine
I hid the most powerful magical bells
You can finish this latest one I started
Ring it and it shall lead you to the others
Find all three of them then come and find me
Love
Papa
Presently holding the Unfinished Bell. Trying to collect it prompts: It's not finished yet.
The broken doorbell. I could fix this.
It's protected by a magical orb.
A wooden hat rack by the door. The Red Cap cosmetic can be found here.
